title: Myrmechila truncata
taxonomy: Myrmechila truncata is classified as a species within the genus Myrmechila. This genus is part of the family Orchidaceae, which includes orchids. Myrmechila truncata is a type of orchid that belongs to the subfamily Orchidoideae. Further classification places it within the tribe Orchideae. It is native to the tropical regions of Asia.
uses: Myrmechila truncata, also known as the truncated myrmecia orchid, has been found to have potential medicinal properties. However, research on this specific orchid species is limited, and more studies are needed to confirm its medicinal uses.
